description: Style Notelomani deodorant for men is a versatile fragrance that goes for any occasion, be it formal or casual. Spray some on when you're hitting the gym or crashing at a friend's place. It will not overpower that expensive perfume or aftershave you're dabbing on so you can use this purely to stay BO-free even on date nights or a corporate meeting. Product DetailsLomani Guilty Man is a deodorant for men that comes in an aerosol spray canister that has a shiny silver topCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize   200 ml
